_comment: Per-project deploy config. Copy to deploy/config.json (gitignored) and fill in. Used by deploy/deploy.sh. The reusable GitHub workflow takes the same values as workflow inputs/secrets instead of this file.

app.name: MyApp
app._comment_containers: Container names to verify are running post-deploy. The first is treated as the primary app container (rebuilt/recreated). Add a proxy container if you run nginx/caddy in front.
app._comment_proxy: Optional. If present, deploy.sh auto-selects an nginx config based on which certs exist on the host. Omit the whole block for projects without a reverse proxy.
app._comment_db: Optional. If present, deploy.sh/workflow backs up this file on the host before deploying and excludes it from the file sync. Forward-only — rollback is code-only.
app._comment_hooks: Optional post-deploy smoke check run inside the primary container. Skipped if absent.
